Contact us directly

Cash · Bank transfer · Visa
Mobile money (MTN & Telecel)

We will respond to confirm availability and provide deposit payment details. A 100% non-refundable deposit is required to secure your appointment.


Gift Cards

Purchase a
gift card

Gift cards are available from GHS 100, with no upper limit. Redeemable against any service, package or product across all five locations. Valid for 90 days from date of purchase.

Gift Card Details

Cash, bank transfer, Visa, mobile money at any location.
